top_tweets.text:
I made a tool that turns any URL into a clean DESIGN.md

Extract layout, typography, colors, and component patterns from any site, then save them to your private library.

It also includes 160+ downloadable design systems if you need a good starting point. https://t.co/FJWe8jZ2UU
top_tweets.author: MengTo
top_tweets.name: Meng To
top_tweets.summary_zh: 開發了一個工具，可將任何網站 URL 轉換成結構化的 DESIGN.md 文件，自動提取佈局、字體、色彩和元件模式，並提供 160+ 可下載的設計系統作為起點。

top_tweets.text: There is so much creative authority that can be found in poster design, where the image does more of the communication than the text.
top_tweets.author: leyeConnect
top_tweets.name: LEYE
top_tweets.summary_zh: 海報設計中蘊含大量創作自主性，影像本身比文字承載更多溝通功能。

top_tweets.text:
CODEX SKILL TO REVIEW ANY WEBSITE!

Just give Codex a URL and it audits the design + frontend for you

-> Scores the UX/UI
-> Finds weak design spots
-> Checks responsive + accessibility issues
-> Gives prioritized fixes

Install:
npx --yes codex-design-audit-skill@latest

100% https://t.co/ZAhK3Vdbqi
top_tweets.author: Kappaemme1926
top_tweets.name: Kappaemme
top_tweets.summary_zh: 推出 Codex 技能工具，可審查任何網站的設計與前端：評分 UX/UI、找出設計弱點、檢查響應式與無障礙問題，並提供優先修復建議。

top_tweets.text: 8 Rules of Great Design most designers ignore. 🚀 https://t.co/tWMEQvnICf

top_tweets.summary_zh: 整理了 8 條多數設計師忽略的優秀設計規則。

top_tweets.text:
must read 

Marcus went from product manager to shipping product like a madman @every with coding agents

he wrote the definitive guide for how to do it: https://t.co/IQpwPQK1Fi https://t.co/GKYDOc6ov8
top_tweets.author: danshipper
top_tweets.name: Dan Shipper 📧
top_tweets.summary_zh: 推薦 Marcus 撰寫的指南，分享他如何從 PM 轉型為使用 coding agents 快速交付產品的實踐經驗。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Montage
top_products.author: Aarav Makadia
top_products.tagline: The runtime framework for agentic user interfaces!
top_products.summary_zh: 專為 agentic 使用者介面設計的執行時框架，協助開發者建構由 AI 代理驅動的應用程式。

top_products.title: nudge
top_products.author: Shunsuke Nakagawa
top_products.tagline: Drop your tasks. AI auto-schedules your whole week.
top_products.summary_zh: AI 自動排程工具，使用者只需輸入待辦事項，系統會自動安排整週行程。

top_products.title: Marx Finance
top_products.author: Ahmet Sülek
top_products.summary_zh: 透過多個 AI 代理針對市場議題進行辯論，提供投資決策參考觀點。

top_products.title: LaunchCut
top_products.author: Andrew Hoffart
top_products.summary_zh: 互動式 iOS 示範製作工具，讓開發者和產品團隊快速建立應用程式展示原型。

top_products.title: PeekFocus
top_products.author: Sulochanal Chellian
top_products.tagline: One keystroke blurs everything behind your active window
top_products.summary_zh: macOS 生產力工具，按下快捷鍵即可模糊背景視窗，只保留當前作業視窗清晰顯示。

top_products.title: Ghosted: Smart Presence
top_products.author: Calvin Thurman
top_products.tagline: Pause media or lock your screen when you step away
top_products.summary_zh: 智慧偵測使用者是否離開電腦，自動暫停媒體播放或鎖定螢幕以保護隱私。
